name: api-only
description: REST API only — no web UI, consumed by external clients
productSnippet: REST API: resources and endpoints per domain. No frontend; API is consumed by other clients. Document with OpenAPI.

architectureHints.systemStyle: Modular Monolith — resource modules with clear boundaries
architectureHints.codeOrganisation: Layered: routes → services → domain → Prisma. Group by resource, not by layer.
architectureHints.dataPattern: Repository pattern — one service class per resource
architectureHints.apiStyle: REST + OpenAPI contract. Generate spec/api/openapi.yaml before writing code.
architectureHints.errorStrategy: Consistent error envelope: { code, message, details }. Document all 4xx/5xx.

commonPatterns: OpenAPI-first: write spec/api/openapi.yaml before backend code
API key or JWT auth depending on consumer type
quickStartPrompts: Build a REST API for a booking system, no UI
Build an API for a mobile app — no web frontend
